nodes.label: User Data Asset (Word Corpus, Sensory Tags, Location Patterns)

Law 1: No Guilt (No alarming error states)
Law 3: 30 Seconds is a Session (≤3 taps)
Typography System (IBM Plex Sans, Sarabun, Noto Sans SC, Noto Sans Lao)
Rationale: Font Selection for Multilingual Warmth
Rationale: No-Guilt Visual Language (error-400 annotation only)
Rationale: Warmth + Cognitive Lightness as Dual Requirement
Mood Tint Overlays (20% opacity card backgrounds)
Kotoka Core Loop (Input → Sensory Tag → Gemini → Session → SRS)
System Architecture (React Native → Cloud Run → GCP)
Security Controls (API keys, Firebase token, Geohash, PDPA, Rate Limit)
Key Data Models (Word, UserWord, SensesTag, Session, ConsentRecord)
Memory Map Logic (Pin colors, Revisit Trigger, Offline)
Six Sense Channels (Visual, Location, Atmosphere, Mood, Energy, Sound)
FCM Push Notification System (Revisit, Streak, Mission)
Vocabulary Packs (Office, Café, Logistics, Airport, Retail)
Koko Character (AI Conversation Partner via Gemini 2.5 Flash + Cloud TTS)
Aha Moment Target (60% recall within 48h via Location Revisit)
Variational Free Energy 𝓕[ρ] (KL divergence + log-likelihood)
Life-Episode Graph Curvature Term LEG λ₂⟨exp(−κ^LEG),ρ⟩
Transfer Cohomology Penalty λ₄ dim H¹(ℱ[ρ])
Closure Theorem (all operational formulas are corollaries of δS=0)
Benamou–Brenier Characterization v=∇φ (optimal curriculum is gradient flow)
Ollivier–Ricci Curvature κ^LEG on Life-Episode Graph
Context Sheaf ℱ of Vocabulary (contravariant functor on context space C)
Scene Coupling Tensor T^σ (symmetric PSD, per-scene)
Rationale: Why Minimize a Cost Functional (3-step argument)
Rationale: Quadratic Kinetic Cost (Benamou–Brenier + cognitive load literature)
Rationale: Free Energy Principle (Friston 2010) as model of neural learning
Rationale: Sheaf Cohomology for Context-Transfer Failures
Input Layer (Text / Photo / Location — manual & auto)
Onboarding Data (Tier 1 must-have + Tier 2 optional fields)
LLM Vocabulary Corpus Augmentation Engine (Gemini 2.5 Flash)
Structured Word Object (Core + Pedagogical + Personal + Usage + Learning State + Relationship tags)
Emotional Relevance Score E(w) = ω₁·Src + ω₂·Loc + ω₃·Int + ω₄·Freq
Practical Urgency Score U(w) (deadline logistic + routine urgency)
Ease Factor EF(w) — Modified SM-2 Update Formula
Spaced Repetition Interval I_n(w) = I_(n-1) × EF × (1 + μ·E(w))
Item Response Theory Difficulty Calibration (2PL model θ_u, a_w, b_w)
Half-Life Regression HLR Personalized Forgetting Model (Settles & Meeder 2016)
Dynamic Corpus — Living With the User (6 principles)
Location Saturation σ(ℓ) with Depth Tiers (5 tiers)
Scene Association (scene_id links co-learned words from same input event)
Activation Failure Gap (root cause: no personal relevance, context mismatch, no sensory binding)
Phase 1 — Design System & Full UI/UX Specification (43 screens, 34 components)
Phase 2 — Foundation & Core Data Pipeline (Firebase, onboarding, Snap, Gemini)
Phase 3 — AI/Learning Engine & Sensory Layer (SRS, Koko, Memory Map, FCM, 6-lang)
Phase 4 — Monetization, Polish & Launch (KotoCoin, subscriptions, App Store)
Tech Stack (React Native + Expo, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Firebase, Cloud Run/Fastify)
Design Token System (Teal-Purple color palette, typography, spacing, motion)
Component Library (34 components: atoms, molecules, organisms, templates)
KokoAnimation Component (Lottie-based mascot, 7 states, screen mappings)
VocabCard Component (target word, SensoryTagBar, audio, native text, location pin)
SensoryTagBar Component (location, weather, mood, sound type tags)
Sensory Encoding (6 contextual channels: visual, location, weather, mood, energy, sound)
Location-Triggered Review (FCM fires within 150m of learning event geohash)
Snap Input Pipeline (Camera / Text / GPS tabs → Gemini augmentation)
Primary Persona Pam (Thai→English, career goal, 10-15 min/day)
Six-Language Support (TH, EN, ZH, ES, VI, LO — 30 directional pairs)
Mixed Session Engine (4 node types: flashcard, fill-blank, Koko conversation, pronunciation)
Onboarding Screen Specifications (ONB-01 to ONB-07, 7 screens)
Cloud Run API Layer (Fastify endpoints: /analyze-image, /srs-schedule, /koko-reply, etc.)
